evals.prompt: Import this pasted RMLS-style listing for 10249 N Tyler Ave, Portland, OR 97203. It is active, $479,000, 3 beds, 2 baths, 1146 sqft, detached ranch, HOA no, MLS#555676113, with a remodeled description and room dimensions. Use the existing buyer profile.
evals.expected_output: Creates a main listing file and companion source file with import-date address filenames, extracts facts, stores minimally formatted source content separately, records an import activity log entry, and identifies unknowns like remodel scope and cooling.

evals.prompt: Import this Zillow apartment community URL: https://www.zillow.com/apartments/portland-or/the-waverleigh-apartments/5XjV3L/
evals.expected_output: Refuses the import because it is a rental apartment community, using a concise user-facing explanation and not creating listing files.

evals.prompt: Import this Redfin URL, but the page does not show a confirmed street address: https://www.redfin.com/OR/Portland/33rd-Ave-97219/home/191748253
evals.expected_output: Stops import, asks for the confirmed full street address, and does not create an unknown-address fallback file.

evals.prompt: Update the existing Tyler Ave listing. The price dropped from $479,000 to $459,000 and Market Status changed from Active to Pending.
evals.expected_output: Updates current listing facts, preserves history in Listing Events, and treats this as an update to the existing address record rather than a new listing.

evals.prompt: Add initial feedback for Tyler Ave: cute remodel, like the one-level layout, nervous it is a flip, and the bedrooms may be too small. When done, suggest any buyer profile updates but do not apply them.
evals.expected_output: Writes a timestamped Activity Log entry, updates listing interpretation, and presents Proposed Buyer Profile Updates with Evidence and Section lines without applying them.

evals.prompt: Add realtor feedback for Blandena: 'Lovely house but I feel pretty confident the foundation will rule it out. There are other things to note that could either be immediate or within a short time that would need to be addressed.'
evals.expected_output: Records Advisor Feedback with raw feedback preserved separately from interpretation, identifies condition/risk impact, and adds follow-up questions.
Generates an in-chat report, states the active-listing filter used, and does not create or rely on a listing-index.md file.
